Reported CPO extraction rate (Rendemen) 21.25% in 2024, down from 22.16% in 2023 due to El Nino drought. KER 4.41%.

No palm oil operations. IPPE processes coconut (kelapa), not oil palm (kelapa sawit). No plantation area (buys raw copra from third-party suppliers in Riau, Palembang, Jambi, Tangerang, etc.). Single coconut flesh processing factory in Balingbing, Pagaden Barat, Subang, West Java. Subsidiary ALJ holds 13,587 ha location permit in Katingan, Central Kalimantan for horticultural plantation but subsidiary is pre-operating. 2023 product mix by revenue: Crude Coconut Oil (CCO) 86.08% / Copra Meal (Bungkil Kelapa) 13.92%. All sales domestic (Jakarta, Subang, Bekasi, Central Java, Tangerang); no export sales reported.

No PKS operating in 2022 - PKS under construction (60 TPH, targeted Dec 2023). Company purchased all CPO from third parties (mainly related parties PG, ACL, BAS, KAM, MSAM). FFB output 54,299 tons (vs 32,576 ton target, 167% achievement). FAME output 308,142 KL (vs 300,000 KL target, 103%); RBDPO/olein/stearin/PFAD/PKE produced via refinery and biodiesel plant.

PKS (60 TPH) came online late 2023 (commissioning period). FAME output 310,678 KL (vs 333,562 KL target, 93%); FFB 208,107 ton (135% of 154,314 ton target); FAME avg selling price Rp10,985/L (2023) vs Rp12,377/L (2022). Revenue -4% due to lower FAME prices. Merger with PT Jhonlin Agro Lestari 24 Nov 2023 added planting area.

PKS (60 TPH) now fully operational; ~15% of total CPO processed internally sourced (up from near-zero in 2022). FAME production 272,596 KL (down from 310,678 KL in 2023); FFB production 159,688 t (65% of 244,080 t target). Target 2025: internal CPO 20-25% of total purchases.

CPO Extraction Rate 20.42% (2021: 20.53%); Kernel Extraction Rate 3.65%; FFB yield 4.94 t/ha (-10%); CPO yield 1.01 t/ha. Palm mills: 2 POMs Kintap + Marabahan; total POM capacity 90 t/hr (513,000 t/y); used 234,924 t (45.79% util). Rubber sheet 9 plants 6,386 t/y (38.15% util); rubber crumb 3 plants 26,040 t/y (48.00% util). All sales domestic.

CPO Extraction Rate 20.68% (2022: 20.42%); Kernel Extraction Rate 3.69%; FFB yield 5.99 t/ha; CPO yield 1.24 t/ha. Rubber sheet 9 plants 6,386 t/y (24.25% util); rubber crumb 3 plants 26,040 t/y (30.7% util). All sales domestic.

CPO Extraction Rate 19.82% (2023: 20.68%); Kernel Extraction Rate 3.48%; FFB yield 6.62 t/ha; CPO yield 1.31 t/ha. Palm mills: 2 POMs (Kintap + Marabahan ABS); design capacity 513,000 t/y; used 226,797 t (44.2% utilization). Rubber crumb 3 plants 26,040 t/y (52.1%); sheet 9 plants 5,487 t/y (31.95%). Tea factory 400 t/y; 1 coffee plant. All sales domestic (Banten, Jabar, Jatim, Jateng, Kalsel).
